en: Does your company evaluate or review hazard identification and risk assessment procedures at regular intervals to ensure accuracy and continual improvement (e.g. Safe System of Work, JHA, etc.)?
Does your company maintain records of all evaluations or reviews of hazard identification and risk assessments?
Is each task assessed according to risk?
Are your company's hazard identification and risk assessment procedures reviewed and updated periodically or when things change (company, regulations or conditions)?
Does your company train your employees on hazards identified and risks assessed?
Does your company have a system in place for when a permit to work is required?
Do all employees have authority to stop unsafe work?
Does your company's safety management system include policies that apply to lone / remote workers?
Avetta PQF - Risk Assessment/Safe System of Work
